title: Argentinian Haricot Bean Stir Fry
description: A hearty and flavorful stir fry dish from Argentina, made with haricot beans, tangy sauce, and chewy textures.
instructions: Heat the stir fry oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the haricot beans, tangy sauce, and chewy texture. Stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened and the flavors have melded together.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Enjoy as a main dish or as a side dish with your favorite Argentinian-inspired meal.
